evals.prompt: Create an example script showing how to create a simple line plot with the GSP_API library. Make sure it works with both the Matplotlib and DatoViz backends.
evals.expected_output: Clean, well-documented Python example script demonstrating a line plot with both backends. Script should be in examples/ directory and include proper docstrings and comments.

evals.prompt: Write an example script that demonstrates how to use advanced visualization features of GSP. It should show data visualization with proper labels and styling.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive example script with advanced features, clear documentation, tested with both backends, ready for use in documentation.

evals.prompt: Add an example showing how to work with GSP_API and switch between different visualization backends (Matplotlib and DatoViz). The example should be self-contained and educational.
evals.expected_output: Well-structured example demonstrating backend switching with environment variables, clear comments explaining the approach, verified working with both backends.
